sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25296" key="diamoira/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαμοιρ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n25296.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divide into equal portions, cut up,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόστον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:138" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.138</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
